CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. Do not change this field or hide it from the layout. Sum of monthly principal & interest payments listed in related Funding Sources that have a Funding Source Type of "Loan (Purchase)."
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Sum of monthly principal & interest payments listed in related Funding Sources that have a Funding Source Type of "Loan (Purchase)."
CustomField.label: Monthly Principal & Interest Payments
